title: Team and Enterprise Features
description: Enable teams to share and manage development environment configurations through remote config loading, configuration inheritance, profiles, lock files, and audit logging
acceptance_criteria: Remote config loading from HTTPS URLs with jarvy setup --from <URL>
Config inheritance with extends field supporting single or multiple URLs
Lock file generation with jarvy lock command
Lock file verification with jarvy setup --locked
Audit logging for compliance when enabled in config
Config validation with jarvy validate command
Security: HTTPS only for remote configs
Clear error messages for all failure scenarios

tasks.title: Create remote config fetching module
tasks.description: Create src/remote/mod.rs for fetching configs from HTTPS URLs
subtasks: Add reqwest dependency with minimal features
Create RemoteConfig struct with URL, headers, timeout
Implement HTTPS-only validation (HTTP only in debug)
Add clear error messages for network failures

tasks.title: Implement config caching
tasks.description: Create src/remote/cache.rs for caching fetched configs
subtasks: Store cached configs with URL hash as filename
Store content hash for integrity verification

tasks.title: Add extends field to config
tasks.description: Parse extends field in jarvy.toml for inheritance
subtasks: Parse both URL and local path references

tasks.title: Implement inheritance resolution
tasks.description: Create src/extends/mod.rs for resolving config inheritance
subtasks: Detect and reject circular extends chains
Implement merge_configs() for combining base and overlay
Child config values override parent values
Handle both remote and local extends sources

tasks.title: Add profiles section to config
tasks.description: Parse [profiles.<name>] sections in jarvy.toml
subtasks: Add Profile struct with description, tools, extends fields
Support profile extends (profile extending another profile)
Parse tools array as subset of main [tools] section

tasks.title: Implement profile selection
tasks.description: Create src/profiles/mod.rs for profile management
subtasks: Implement get_profile() to retrieve profile by name
Implement resolve_profile_tools() to get tool list
Handle profile extends (inherit tools from other profile)
Validate profile tool references against [tools] section

tasks.title: Create lock file module
tasks.description: Create src/lock/mod.rs for lock file management
subtasks: Define LockFile struct with tools and metadata
Define LockedTool struct with version, checksum, source
Define LockMetadata with jarvy_version, timestamp, platform
Implement generate() to create lock from config
Implement save() to write jarvy.lock file
Implement load() to read existing lock file

tasks.title: Implement lock file verification
tasks.description: Add verification logic to compare environment with lock
subtasks: Implement verify() to compare installed vs locked versions
Return Mismatch list with tool, expected, actual
Implement update() to refresh lock with latest compatible versions

tasks.title: Create audit logging module
tasks.description: Create src/audit/mod.rs for compliance audit logging
subtasks: Define AuditEntry struct with timestamp, event, tool, version, user, machine
Define AuditConfig in global config with enabled, log_file, format
Implement hash chain linking entries for tamper detection
Create log file with secure permissions (0600)
Support JSON and text log formats

tasks.title: Implement audit log reading
tasks.description: Add reading and export functionality for audit logs
subtasks: Implement read_entries() to parse log file

tasks.title: Create config validation module
tasks.description: Create src/validate/mod.rs for config linting
subtasks: Define ValidationResult with errors and warnings
Suggest corrections for typos (did you mean...)

tasks.title: Add --from flag to setup command
tasks.description: Add remote config loading to jarvy setup
subtasks: Fetch and parse remote config before setup
Fall back to local config if --from not specified

tasks.title: Add --profile flag to setup command
tasks.description: Add profile selection to jarvy setup
subtasks: Show error if profile not found
Display which profile is being used

tasks.title: Add jarvy profiles command
tasks.description: Add CLI command for listing profiles
subtasks: Implement show <name> action for profile details

tasks.title: Add jarvy lock command
tasks.description: Add CLI command for lock file management
subtasks: Implement default action: generate lock file
Add --verify flag to check environment matches lock

tasks.title: Add --locked flag to setup command
tasks.description: Add lock file enforcement to jarvy setup
subtasks: Load jarvy.lock if present when --locked used
Error if jarvy.lock not found with --locked
Install exact versions from lock file

tasks.title: Add jarvy audit command
tasks.description: Add CLI command for viewing audit logs

tasks.title: Add jarvy validate command
tasks.description: Add CLI command for config validation
subtasks: Add --strict flag to treat warnings as errors

tasks.title: Write integration tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive tests for all new features
subtasks: Test remote config fetching with mock server
Test profile selection and tool filtering
Test lock file generation and verification
Test audit log creation and reading

tasks.title: Update documentation
tasks.description: Document all new features in CLAUDE.md and inline
subtasks: Document remote config loading in CLAUDE.md
Add example jarvy.toml with team features

security_considerations: HTTPS only for remote configs (HTTP allowed only in debug mode)
Validate TOML syntax before executing commands
Size limits on config files (1MB max)
Secure file permissions on cache and audit logs
Hash chain for tamper-evident audit logs

implementation_notes.backwards_compatible: All new features are opt-in, existing configs work unchanged

risks.description: Remote config availability may block setup
risks.mitigation: Cache configs, allow offline mode with cached version
HTTPS only, validate before use, no arbitrary code execution
jarvy lock --update command, CI checks for lock freshness
Depth limit, jarvy config show --resolved command
